name: Mexican Flan (Custard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare caramel by heating white sugar in a heavy-bottomed pan until it melts and turns light brown. Quickly pour the caramel into a greased baking dish and tilt the dish to coat the bottom evenly.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs, then gradually add the sugar and salt. Mix in the evaporated milk and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture over the caramel layer in the prepared baking dish.
4. Place the dish on a rack set over a pan of hot water and place it in the oven preheated to 350°F (175°C). Bake, uncovered, for 1 hour or until the custard is set.
5. Allow the flan to cool completely before refrigerating. Do not stir during cooking for best results.
